summary: A small rectangular bunker-style structure with a gable roof. The building features a stone brick foundation and walls with multiple window openings, topped with a dark wood roof. The structure sits on a raised platform with a gravel base and appears to be a defensive or storage structure.
elements: roof peak with small chimney or vent
rebuild_hints: Build rectangular stone brick walls approximately 8 blocks wide by 6 blocks deep
Create a raised platform using gravel blocks as foundation
Install window openings on front and back walls (approximately 5 windows visible on front)
Construct a gable roof using dark wood planks with peak centered on length axis
Add small roof peak detail at center top
Ensure bilateral symmetry in window placement
Windows appear to be 2 blocks wide by 2 blocks tall with stone brick frames
uncertainties: Exact interior layout not visible from exterior views
Precise window frame material (appears to be stone brick or concrete)
Whether structure has multiple interior rooms or single chamber
Exact height of foundation platform (appears to be 1-2 blocks)
Whether there are doors or only windows for access
